prompt: In position, the board is connected and your improvement pressure is strong. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Connected textures in position can justify pressure when strong improvement paths and fold equity line up.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. In-position connected texture supports a raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the connected-board pressure: in position, strong improvement paths plus fold equity justify raising instead of taking the passive line.
